title: EaseonSS - BoneHarvest
description: BoneHarvest lets you instantly harvest plants using bone items. Simply right-click supported plants with bone meal, bone, or bone blocks.
body:
## 🌿 Easeon – BoneHarvest **This mod requires EaseonSS-Core** ## Overview **BoneHarvest** is a lightweight server-side mod that lets you instantly harvest plants using bone items. Perfect for quick and convenient resource gathering — simply right-click with bone meal, bone, or bone block on supported plants. **Hold Shift** while using to consume all bones in your hand at once for a mass harvest.
Preview ![showcase](https://github.com/EaseonKit/EaseonSS-BoneHarvest/blob/main/showcase.webp?raw=true)

## Supported Plants > **Sugar Cane** > **Vine** > **Glow Lichen** > **Bush** > **Firefly Bush**
## Harvest Rates > **Bone Meal:** 1x plant > **Bone**: 3x plant > **Bone Block**: 9x plant
## Commands All commands require **OP level 2** or higher. | Command | Description | | ------------------------------ | -------------------- | | /easeon boneharvest | View current status | | /easeon boneharvest | Enable/disable |
Configuration ```json { "enabled": true, "requiredOpLevel": 2 // Requires a server restart to take effect. } ``` `config/easeon/easeon.ss.boneharvest.json`

--- ### 🔗 More Easeon Mods Looking for more lightweight and practical mods in the same style? Check out other Easeon series mods here.
